commands.review_summary:
The PR head applies a quoted-string-aware Content-Disposition parser in an older `src/media/fetch.ts`, while also carrying thousands of unrelated workspace, docs, generated/runtime, and removed-extension changes.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main parses `Content-Disposition` filename parameters with semicolon-delimited regexes, so a quoted filename containing a semicolon will be split incorrectly. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The protected `security` label plus broad sensitive stale branch make this unsafe for automated repair; maintainers need to handle branch security cleanup and request or author a narrow replacement.
